title: afo-mobile-deploy-mcp v0.1 scaffold
next_steps: Commit folder to GitHub source-of-truth repo
Deploy Worker with wrangler or existing Cloudflare multipart MCP
risk_notes: Cloudflare script upload requires a token with Workers Scripts Write
GitHub receipt writes require Contents read/write permission
Binding preservation is explicit in v0.1 and should be upgraded with full Wrangler TOML parsing in v0.2
